systems.system_notes: Primary total knee arthroplasty system with anatomic tibia, multiple bearing constraints and dedicated instrumentation.

trays.tray_notes: Zimmer Biomet product page describes Persona Instrumentation as the core instrument platform.
Zimmer FuZion Instruments are listed in the linked Persona literature and cleaning instructions.

components.component_notes: Product page describes anatomic femoral design with standard and narrow options.
Anatomic tibia design with left and right implant options.
Bearing options include cruciate retaining, sacrificing and higher-constraint options.
Explicitly listed in linked Persona literature.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Patellar component detail is not explicit in the current product page extract.
unresolved_items.reason: Needs deeper review of Persona surgical technique or brochure before adding patellar implant rows.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction uses the main product page and linked literature listing.
